creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
new version of www/linux-flashplugin9 is available from Adobe.
	9.0r151 is available, and the current version of 9.0r124 is vulnerable.
	please update asap.
	however, I cannot test it, for libflashsupport.so is not available, as
	reported in ports/128708.
	btw, does linux-flash10 does not work well ?

Fix: 

please change to use new version.
